title: App Index
description: A structured metadata document describing one or more applications, their platform-specific metadata, localized descriptions, permissions, distribution channels, and associated resources.

$schema.description: The JSON Schema URI for this document.

specVersion.description: The version of the App Index specification this document conforms to.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this document was generated.

generator.description: Identifier of the tool that generated this document.

apps.description: One or more application entries in this index.

localizedString.description: A map of BCP 47 locale codes to localized string values. The key "en" represents the default English locale. When all locales have the same value, a single "en" key is used.

localizedStringArray.description: A map of BCP 47 locale codes to arrays of string values (e.g. keywords).

localizedURL.description: A map of BCP 47 locale codes to URLs. When all locales share the same URL, a single "en" key is used.

imageResourceRef.description: A reference to an image file with metadata for integrity verification and display sizing.

location.description: Path to the image file, relative to the project root. When combined with the source.assets base URL, forms a resolvable URL.

caption.description: Optional accessible description of the image.

localizedImageRef.description: A map of BCP 47 locale codes to image resource references.

localizedScreenshots.description: A map of BCP 47 locale codes to arrays of screenshot image references.

permission.description: A platform-specific permission declaration. The key identifier format is defined by the platform (e.g. "NSCameraUsageDescription" on Apple platforms, "android.permission.CAMERA" on Android).

description.description: Localized human-readable explanation of why this permission is needed.

channel.description: A distribution channel entry with an identifier and catalog URL. Well-known channel keys include "appleappstore", "googleplaystore", "fdroid", "altstore", "testflight", "amazonappstore", "homebrew", "flatpak", and "microsoftstore".

id.description: The application's identifier within this distribution channel.

url.description: URL to the application's listing in this distribution channel.

assets.description: Image assets for the platform. Standard keys include 'icon', 'screenshots', and 'featureGraphic'.

icon.description: The application icon for this platform.

platform.description: Platform-specific metadata for one build target of the application. The platform identifier is the key in the parent "platforms" object (e.g. "ios", "android"), not a field within this object.

version.description: Human-readable version string for this platform build.

buildNumber.description: Internal build number or version code.

bundleIdentifier.description: Apple bundle identifier (e.g. "com.example.app"). Present on Apple platform entries.

applicationId.description: Android application ID (e.g. "com.example.app"). Present on Android platform entries.

title.description: Platform-specific display name override. When absent, consumers SHOULD use the app-level title.

subtitle.description: Platform-specific promotional text override. When absent, consumers SHOULD use the app-level subtitle.

description.description: Platform-specific description override. When absent, consumers SHOULD use the app-level description.

keywords.description: Platform-specific keyword override. When absent, consumers SHOULD use the app-level keywords.

releaseNotes.description: Platform-specific release notes override. When absent, consumers SHOULD use the app-level releaseNotes.

channels.description: Distribution channels for this platform build. Keys are channel identifiers (e.g. "appleappstore", "googleplaystore").

assets.description: Image assets (icon, screenshots, feature graphics) for this platform.

metadata.description: Platform-specific configuration metadata (e.g. manifest, entitlements, plist data). Contents are opaque and platform-defined.

sbom.description: SPDX Software Bill of Materials for this platform build. Conforms to SPDX 2.3 JSON format (https://spdx.github.io/spdx-spec/v2.3/).

url.description: The source repository clone URL. Intentionally not constrained to format:uri because SSH clone URLs (e.g. git@github.com:Org/Repo.git) are valid values.

release.description: URL to the release page for the current version.

assets.description: Base URL for resolving image location paths. Consumers construct full image URLs as: assets + location.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the source code.

app.description: Metadata for a single application across all supported platforms. Localized fields at this level are shared defaults; platform-level values take precedence when present. Consumers SHOULD resolve each locale by checking the platform first, then falling back to the app level.

name.description: The canonical machine-readable name of the application (may differ from the user-facing title).

title.description: Localized display name shared across all platforms. When all locales have the same value, collapsed to a single "en" key.

subtitle.description: Localized short promotional text shared across all platforms.

description.description: Localized full description shared across all platforms.

keywords.description: Localized search keywords shared across all platforms.

releaseNotes.description: Localized release notes shared across all platforms.

platforms.description: Per-platform metadata. Keys are platform identifiers (e.g. "ios", "android", "macos", "windows", "linux").

links.description: Cross-platform links (privacy, support, marketing, etc.). Each value is a localized URL map.
